---
title: "Exploring the prediction of CVD using machine learning"
techniques:
  - Machine Learning
  - Explainable AI
areas:
  -
categories:
  - Machine Learning
  - Explainable AI
author:
  - name: Rohan Sitaram
    affiliation: NHS North Central London ICB
organisations:
  - NHS North Central London ICB
image: "6072.PNG"
title-block-banner: ../../banner.png
status: Active
pub-info:
  abstract:
   The project aims to explore how well machine learning algorithms, predict CVD using binary classification models on existing data. 
  links:
  - name: Video
    url:
    icon: fa-brands fa-youtube
  - name: Code
    url:
    icon: fa-brands fa-github
  - name: Website
    url:
    icon: fa-solid fa-globe
  - name: Paper
    url:
    icon: fa-solid fa-file-contract
---

The goal of the project is to explore how well machine learning algorithms (starting with Logistic Regression and then potentially moving on to others for comparison), predict CVD using binary classification models on data already held. 

Assessing against the main metrics (Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 Score, AUC/ROC), and then further exploring what the model considers to be the most important factors when making predictions
